entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: Climate resilient cereal used in nutrient-rich formulations to improve child nutrition

entities.name: PULSE
entities.description: Leguminous crop used in nutrient-rich formulations to improve child nutrition

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Oilseed crop used in nutrient-rich formulations to improve child nutrition

entities.name: TRIBAL CHILDREN
entities.description: Pre-school children aged 3 to 6 years in Telangana, India, who were the subjects of the nutrition intervention

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: State in India where the community-level nutrition intervention was implemented

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where the study was conducted

entities.name: NUTRITION INTERVENTION
entities.description: A community-level program using nutrient-rich formulations of millet, pulse, and groundnut to improve growth and health

entities.name: HEIGHT
entities.description: Anthropometric measurement used to monitor growth and stunting

entities.name: WEIGHT
entities.description: Anthropometric measurement used to monitor growth and underweight status

entities.name: MID-UPPER-ARM CIRCUMFERENCE
entities.description: Anthropometric measurement (MUAC) used to monitor nutritional status and wasting

entities.name: HAEMOGLOBIN LEVELS
entities.description: Blood measurement (Hb) used to monitor anaemic status

entities.name: PAIRED T-TEST
entities.description: Statistical method used to determine significant differences between pre- and post-intervention measurements

entities.name: WASTING
entities.description: Nutritional deficiency indicated by Weight-for-Height Z-score (WHZ)

entities.name: STUNTING
entities.description: Nutritional deficiency indicated by Height-for-Age Z-score (HAZ)

entities.name: UNDERWEIGHT
entities.description: Nutritional deficiency indicated by Weight-for-Age Z-score (WAZ)

entities.name: ANAEMIA
entities.description: Medical condition characterized by low haemoglobin levels

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP DISCUSSIONS
entities.description: Qualitative method involving mothers and teachers to confirm the positive impact of the intervention

entities.name: DIETARY DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of food items consumed, promoted by the nutrient-rich formulations

entities.name: NUTRITION AND HEALTH STATUS
entities.description: The overall physical well-being and nutritional state of the children
